Functions and utilities for managing ANCS notifications, app metadata, and phone call events in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[ancs_filtering.c](ancs_filtering.c.md)**: Functions for recording and managing app notification preferences, including mute settings.
- **[ancs_filtering.h](ancs_filtering.h.md)**: Functions for managing notification preferences and mute settings for apps in ANCS.
- **[ancs_item.c](ancs_item.c.md)**: Functions for creating and populating ANCS notification items with attributes and actions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[ancs_item.h](ancs_item.h.md)**: Functions to create and update timeline items using ANCS notification data.
- **[ancs_known_apps.h](ancs_known_apps.h.md)**: Defines application metadata for notifications, including app IDs, icons, and colors, with platform-specific variations.
- **[ancs_notifications.c](ancs_notifications.c.md)**: Handles Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS) notifications, including filtering, updating, and dismissing notifications.
- **[ancs_notifications.h](ancs_notifications.h.md)**: Functions for handling ANCS notifications and notification removal in Pebble firmware.
- **[ancs_notifications_util.c](ancs_notifications_util.c.md)**: Utilities for handling ANCS notifications, including app metadata retrieval and timestamp parsing.
- **[ancs_notifications_util.h](ancs_notifications_util.h.md)**: Utilities for handling ANCS app metadata and identifying specific iOS app notifications.
- **[ancs_phone_call.c](ancs_phone_call.c.md)**: Handles incoming and removed phone call events and manages missed call notifications for ANCS.
- **[ancs_phone_call.h](ancs_phone_call.h.md)**: Functions for handling incoming and removed phone call notifications via ANCS in Pebble firmware.
- **[nexmo.c](nexmo.c.md)**: Handles Nexmo reauthentication SMS by checking and processing messages for Pebble firmware.
- **[nexmo.h](nexmo.h.md)**: Functions for handling reauthentication SMS messages in notification preferences.
